headline: Technical Consultant: AI, WordPress, and Developer Enablement
subheadline: Where tech meets tenacity — and Java isn’t just coffee.

impactStrip.label: Developers supported in the PageLines ecosystem
Weekly sales overseen in Starbucks operations
Team members managed and mentored in retail leadership roles

summary: Customer-facing technical professional based in Lisle, Illinois with experience across SaaS support, developer community management, web consulting, and high-volume operations leadership. I diagnose complex user issues, document repeatable solutions, and connect customer feedback to practical product and process improvements.
differentiator: I bridge digital support and real-world operations: from developer ecosystems and technical troubleshooting to frontline team leadership, coaching, and customer experience execution under pressure.

items: Developer community growth and relationship management
Product feedback loops from support conversations
Technical troubleshooting across web, DNS, and publishing workflows
Technical writing, internal docs, and customer-facing guides

experience.title: Independent Technology Consultant
experience.location: Greater Chicago Area, IL (Open to US Remote)
highlights: Delivering consulting services across resume development, IT strategy, web development, and WordPress design.
Owning projects end-to-end from discovery and scoping through implementation and post-launch support.
Reducing manual workflows through API integrations, automation, and repeatable client handoff documentation.
Building support-focused web solutions with WordPress, WooCommerce, Cloudflare, and AI-assisted workflows.

experience.title: Shift Supervisor
highlights: Led teams in high-volume stores while enforcing service, safety, and operational standards.
Improved service speed by 18% year over year through coaching, workflow consistency, and escalation handling.
Sustained weekly sales in the $35K-$45K range while mentoring team members into leadership roles.

experience.title: Starbucks Manager
highlights: Managed daily operations for a Starbucks unit with food safety and quality control accountability.
Led approximately 25 baristas in scheduling, coaching, and service-quality execution.
Maintained high weekly sales performance while balancing staffing and customer experience goals.

experience.title: Freelance Artist / Consultant
highlights: Provided customer-facing product consulting, education, and recommendation support.
Applied sales and service best practices to build trust and repeat engagement.

experience.title: Happiness Engineer
highlights: Provided technical support across publishing, site configuration, billing, and domain/DNS setup.
Documented solutions and improved support guidance for common user issues.
Collaborated with product and engineering through clear bug reports and reproducible issue details.

experience.title: Community Manager
highlights: Built and supported a community of 50+ developers around the PageLines ecosystem.
Helped grow app marketplace participation through onboarding content, tutorials, and community engagement.
Managed developer relationships and translated user feedback into clearer product priorities.

experience.title: Customer Service Representative
highlights: Delivered customer support in a fast-paced retail technology environment.
Contributed to loss prevention, internal communications, and inventory process improvements.

experience.title: Writing Coach / Editor
highlights: Facilitated writing and journalism workshops for Chicago-area students.
Edited student work and coached communication skills through structured feedback.

projects.name: Meeting Transcript Summarizer
projects.description: Python workflow that transforms transcript files into concise, structured client summaries for delivery teams.
projects.impact: Reduced manual meeting-summary effort by around 80% and improved consistency across client updates.

projects.name: AI-Powered FAQ Chatbot Prototype
projects.description: Client-facing FAQ assistant built with a custom knowledge base and prompt design tuned for support-style conversations.
projects.impact: Improved response consistency and created a reusable framework for AI-enabled customer self-service.

projects.name: Client E-commerce Implementation (NDA)
projects.description: Responsive e-commerce implementation with payment integration, conversion-oriented UX, and production hardening.
projects.impact: Enabled measurable online revenue growth while maintaining stable launch and post-launch operations.

certifications: Certified Professional Food Manager (CPFM), ServSafe (previously held)
